violations.text: A pitcher and sponges were observed in the hand-washing sink in the dish washing area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Items were removed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

Chemical spray bottle was stored hanging from the single service items (lids) shelf. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Spray bottle was moved for proper storage at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The non-food-contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris... - The equipment surface between the ovens and bagel bins - Shelving in the walk-in cooler - Walk-in cooler fan shrouds Equipment is to be cleaned at a frequency to preclude the buildup of soil and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2025
